changeSet.author: dina-export-api
changeSet.comment: Convert columnAliases from string array to jsonb to support Map<String, List<String>> structure
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE data_export ALTER COLUMN column_aliases TYPE JSONB USING CASE WHEN column_aliases IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE to_jsonb(column_aliases) END
ALTER TABLE data_export_template ALTER COLUMN column_aliases TYPE JSONB USING CASE WHEN column_aliases IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE to_jsonb(column_aliases) END

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE data_export ALTER COLUMN column_aliases TYPE text[] USING CASE WHEN column_aliases IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN jsonb_typeof(column_aliases) = 'array' THEN ARRAY(SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text(column_aliases)) ELSE NULL END

ALTER TABLE data_export_template ALTER COLUMN column_aliases TYPE text[] USING CASE WHEN column_aliases IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN jsonb_typeof(column_aliases) = 'array' THEN ARRAY(SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text(column_aliases)) ELSE NULL END
